discovery_context_policy.context_derivation: V63 discovery uses sequence plus public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only; V61/V62 labels and post-seal holdout classes are not used for prediction context

prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: Crystal structure of the wild-type Thermus thermophilus 70S ribosome in complex with benzoxaborole derivative of azithromycin (AZI-BB2), mRNA, aminoacylated A-site Phe-tRNAphe, aminoacylated P-site fMet-tRNAmet, and deacylated E-site tRNAphe at 2.45A resolution. Entity description: 30S ribosomal protein S18. Organism: Thermus thermophilus HB8. Polymer composition: protein/NA. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived hydrophobic closure tendency; public metadata indicates multiple polymer instances or molecule copies. Coordinates, native contacts, residue-residue distances, and validation annotations are unopened before the prediction hash.

V63 discovery metadata context marks: assembly_context cofactor_context ligand_context metal_context oligomer_context partner_copy_context. Marks come from sequence and public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only; coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, and native topology are blocked before sealing.
